landing.heroSubtitle: A production-ready full-stack platform with AI-powered chat, knowledge base retrieval, secure authentication, and a modern dashboard.
landing.featureAiChatDesc: Conversational AI assistant with real-time streaming, conversation history, and tool-calling capabilities.
landing.featureRagDesc: Vector search across your documents with retrieval-augmented generation. Ingest PDFs, DOCX, and more.
landing.featureAuthDesc: JWT-based auth with refresh tokens, OAuth integration, session management, and role-based access control.
landing.featureDashboardDesc: System health monitoring, user management, and collection statistics at a glance.
landing.featureApiDesc: Auto-documented FastAPI backend with OpenAPI specs, versioned endpoints, and async database access.
landing.featureRealtimeDesc: WebSocket-powered streaming for instant AI responses and live updates across the application.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create your account and start exploring the platform.
landing.footerDesc: Full-stack AI application platform with enterprise-grade features.
